name: Skanor-Falsterbo Coast
description: Quiet beaches, colorful bath huts, birdwatching, and a calm village feeling at Sweden's southwestern edge.
bestFor: summer day trip, beach walk, dog-friendly slow travel
tip: Travel Lund to Malmo and continue by bus. Pack layers because the coast changes mood quickly.

name: Ystad Sandskog
description: Forest trails and dunes close to the sea, easy to combine with Ystad's old-town streets.
tip: Start with the forest loop, then return to town for coffee instead of rushing onward.

name: Hovs Hallar
description: Dramatic cliffs, sea views, and unusual geology on the northwest coast of Skane.
tip: Best with a car or carefully planned bus connection; wear proper shoes.

name: Krapperup and Molle
description: Gardens, coastal village atmosphere, and an easy add-on to Kullaberg without making the day too intense.
bestFor: slow day trip, garden walk, coastal lunch
tip: Pair with one short viewpoint rather than trying to see the whole peninsula at once.

name: Bosjokloster Castle Park
description: A less obvious castle and lakeside stop with parkland, photo corners, and a quiet countryside feel.
bestFor: short outing, calm walk, countryside photos
tip: Check opening conditions before relying on indoor access; the grounds are the main draw.
